displayNameZh: 深耕一个主题，不要今天做这个明天做那个
summary: Yt Focus One Topic component for Remotion.
summaryZh: 适用于 Remotion 的深耕一个主题，不要今天做这个明天做那个组件。

artifact.usageMarkdown: Copy `remotion/yt-focus-one-topic/src/YtFocusOneTopic.tsx` into your Remotion project, import `YtFocusOneTopic` and `ytFocusOneTopicDefaultProps`, then register the composition.
artifact.agentPrompt: Add the Yt Focus One Topic Remotion asset from remotionhub/remotionhub-assets at remotion/yt-focus-one-topic to my project. Preserve the exported YtFocusOneTopicProps API and register the YtFocusOneTopic composition with the default props.
